page_content: INAG235 Irrigation and Drainage (3 Credits) An overview of U.S. and state water doctrines and plant water use rates. Irrigation systems for residential and athletic ﬁeld use will be discussed covering such topics as hydraulics, sprinkler spacing, pipe selection and sizing, pumps, controllers, valves, and irrigation trouble shooting. Surface and subsurface drainage for turfgrass sites will also be covered. Restriction: Permission of instructor. Credit Only Granted for: INAG235, PLSC235 or PLSC489I. Formerly: PLSC489I. Additional Information: Priority enrollment will be given to IAA and PLSC majors. By permission for available seats.
